commit.subject: LU-0000 lnet: fake copy & ldiskfs
commit.message:
LU-0000 lnet: fake copy & ldiskfs

Purely for testing, this combines fake copy and ldiskfs
writeback caching.

Test-Parameters: forbuildonly
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <patrick.farrell@oracle.com>
Change-Id: I2724ae22a6c5b51c6b3d79e1609861aafeaa4d9b
